mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_RULE WHERE ID = #{id} AND IS_DELETE = 0
SELECT * FROM SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_RULE WHERE COMBINE_RULE_ID = #{combineRuleId} AND IS_DELETE = 0
SELECT * FROM SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_RULE WHERE IS_DELETE = 0 AND STATUS = 1 AND RULE_TYPE = 0 AND LOG_TYPE = #{logType} ORDER BY UPDATE_TIME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_RULE (NAME, DESCRIPTION, LOG_TYPE, RULE_TYPE, LEVEL, LINK_TYPE, CONDITIONS, COMBINE_DURATION, COMBINE_COUNT, COMBINE_RULE_ID, WHITELIST_ID, BLACKLIST_ID, STATUS, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_DELETE) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{logType}, #{ruleType}, #{level}, #{linkType}, #{conditions}, #{combineDuration}, #{combineCount}, #{combineRuleId}, #{whitelistId}, #{blacklistId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE SCM_RJ_SIMP.ALERT_RULE SET NAME = #{name}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, LOG_TYPE = #{logType}, RULE_TYPE = #{ruleType}, LEVEL = #{level}, LINK_TYPE = #{linkType}, CONDITIONS = #{conditions}, COMBINE_DURATION = #{combineDuration}, COMBINE_COUNT = #{combineCount}, COMBINE_RULE_ID = #{combineRuleId}, WHITELIST_ID = #{whitelistId}, BLACKLIST_ID = #{blacklistId}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime} WHERE ID = #{id}
